<!-- 
  TITLE FORMAT: <type>(<scope>): <short summary>
  Types: feat | fix | chore | refactor | docs | test | hotfix
  Example: feat(auth): add OAuth2 login flow
-->
# PR Title <!-- replace this with the actual title of your PR -->

## What & Why
<!--
    What changed? Why was it necessary?
    Link to any prior discussion, Slack thread, or design doc if relevant.
    If this PR is large, explain WHY it couldn't be broken up smaller.
-->

## Related Tickets
- [FIELD-X](https://huly.ingenuity.ph/workbench/aboitiz-67b320cc-9eae81aa84-524325/tracker/FIELD-X)

## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Database / migration change
- [ ] Config / infra / CI change
- [ ] Docs only

## Preview
<!--
    UI changes: include screenshots or screen recording.
    API changes: include a curl/Postman example or response diff.
    No visual change? Write "N/A" — don't just delete this section.
-->

## Affected Areas
<!-- 
    Optional: list which packages/apps in the repo this touches 
    if none, write "N/A" below
-->

<!-- 
    Optional: how was this tested? Unit, integration, manual steps?
